title: ornithogalum euxinum
intro: Ornithogalum euxinum, also known as the Autumn Crocus or Snake Flower, is a perennial bulbous plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Ornithogalum euxinum is commonly prepared as a tincture, infusion, or ointment to harness its medicinal properties and is often used in traditional folk remedies.
